title: clerodendrum multibracteatum
intro: Clerodendrum multibracteatum, also known as the 'Harlequin Glory Bower', is a tropical flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin infections. The health benefits of Clerodendrum multibracteatum include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as aiding in the treatment of fever and rheumatism. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to harness its medicinal properties.
